purpose: Derived admin-only readiness index. Separates current active scoring universe, collected candidate denominators, source availability, and public scoring readiness.

feno_data_read.jq_example: jq '{generated_at, active_scoring_universe, expanded_stock_candidate_universe, etf_universe, source_availability, public_scoring_readiness}' "$DATA_ROOT/admin/fenok-edge-coverage-index.json"

s0_daily_gated_scope.asia_source_policy: HKEX/SSE/SZSE rows use scheduled YF daily stock shards as the counted daily source.

promotion_gate_readiness.caveat: S1 completion means every normalized stock candidate is either promoted into the current public S0 daily/gated chain or explicitly excluded by the blocked promotion ledger; blocked rows are not fabricated public scores.

expanded_stock_candidate_universe.caveat: S1 stock candidates are closed by current public S0 rows plus an explicit blocked/excluded promotion ledger; blocked rows are not scored or fabricated.

evidence_based_readiness.service_gate_scope: ETF Core Daily Basket owns ETF service DAILY/GATED readiness; full scored-ETF daily 1Y continuity stays diagnostic until explicitly promoted.

daily_checks.caveat: Inception-limited gaps are allowed; fetchable required-history gaps keep daily=false.

Full scored-ETF daily 1Y continuity is a rolling diagnostic/backfill track. It must not block ETF Core Daily Basket service readiness; only immediately fetchable gaps keep the full-universe diagnostic lane daily=false.

service_daily_checks.caveat: Inception-limited gaps are allowed; fetchable required-history gaps keep daily=false.

diagnostic_backlog_checks.caveat: Full scored-ETF daily 1Y continuity is a rolling diagnostic/backfill track. It must not block ETF Core Daily Basket service readiness; only immediately fetchable gaps keep the full-universe diagnostic lane daily=false.

evidence_based_readiness.caveat: Core Daily Basket is a smaller ETF sublane. It does not flip full etf_scoring_lane daily/gated readiness.

etf_universe.caveat: ETF scoring is a separate asset_type=etf lane. Public surface proof is separate from DAILY/GATED readiness and does not permit a paid-ready done claim.

source_availability.caveat: These rows prove source/proxy/run-health availability only. They are not paid-service readiness and must not be reported as final public scoring coverage.

sources.label: Korea KRX issuer daily coverage, latest fully populated proof
sources.caveat: Counted from the latest KRX daily stock/KOSDAQ raw files with non-empty rows. Empty calendar runs are not counted as issuer daily coverage.

sources.label: US FINRA flow proxy coverage, active plain-US source-ready
sources.caveat: FINRA source-ready coverage for active plain-US rows only. Missing FINRA rows remain null/low-evidence metrics, not fabricated scores. US_CLASS foreign/class rows are tracked as mapping policy work, not FINRA fetch gaps.
sources.eligibility_policy: active rows where market=US and the counted FINRA source file has been checked for the ticker

sources.label: US OCC listed-options proxy coverage
sources.denominator_label: active_scoring_universe.us where market=US and ticker is a plain OCC underlying
sources.caveat: OCC listed-options volume proxy or counted no-listed-options evidence for active plain-US rows only; not OPRA, premium, greeks, or buyer/seller direction. US_CLASS foreign/class rows are mapping policy work, not broad OCC fetch gaps.

accepted_form_policy.partial_zero_side_rule: A ticker row may count when exactly one OCC side is loaded and the other side is no_record; the no_record side is represented as zero volume.
accepted_form_policy.no_listed_options_rule: Both-side no_record for the counted source date counts as source-ready no-listed-options evidence for daily/gated readiness; it does not fabricate options activity.

sources.label: US_CLASS/non-plain YF daily source coverage
sources.caveat: YF daily stock shards provide counted source freshness for US_CLASS/non-plain active rows. FINRA/OCC flow/options proxy mapping remains separate and is not required for daily source readiness.

sources.label: HKEX/SSE/SZSE YF daily source coverage
sources.caveat: YF daily stock shards provide counted source freshness for HKEX/SSE/SZSE active rows. This proves daily source availability, not exchange-official flow/options proxies.

sources.label: US latest bounded backfill run coverage
sources.caveat: The latest bounded run covers the explicit reference ticker set only; it is a run-health proof, not full US coverage.

target_universe.caveat: Plain OCC underlyings only; dotted/foreign suffixes require owner-reviewed mapping before full universe expansion.

sources.label: Taiwan current active-universe numerator
sources.caveat: Taiwan source collection is active, but the current active scoring universe has no explicit Taiwan bucket. It does not increase the current numerator until universe mapping is fixed.
sources.historical_limitation: TAIFEX OpenAPI endpoints do not support historical backfill queries and remain limited/blocked. TWSE web historical date endpoints support query-by-date (smoke test verified). Bounded historical accumulation is planned via TWSE web endpoints.

source_availability_composites.caveat: Composite counts are useful for source availability progress only. They are not public scoring coverage.

latest_available_kr_plus_us_flow.formula: KRX latest fully populated issuer daily proof + US FINRA flow proxy

latest_available_kr_plus_us_occ.formula: KRX latest fully populated issuer daily proof + US OCC options proxy

strict_new_bounded_run_plus_kr.formula: KRX latest fully populated issuer daily proof + latest US bounded reference-ticker run

remaining_asia_ex_taiwan.caveat: HKEX/SSE/SZSE active rows are included in the current S0 daily/gated source scope through YF daily stock shards; any nonzero count here blocks the all-active-stock daily claim.

latest_available_all_active_daily_source.formula: KRX latest fully populated issuer daily proof + US FINRA source-ready rows + US_CLASS/non-plain YF daily source-ready rows + HKEX/SSE/SZSE YF daily source-ready rows

public_scoring_readiness.done_rule: Only PUBLIC + DAILY + GATED can be called done. Source/admin/smoke rows are not done.

tracks.label: Current active stock scoring chain
tracks.caveat: The current active stock chain is public-scored and has all-active-stock daily/gated source proof under the current S0 scope; FINRA/OCC mapping remains separate proxy expansion work for non-plain rows.

checks.eligibility_policy: active_scoring_universe rows where market=KRX or KOSDAQ; counted date is the latest fully populated issuer daily proof date.
checks.caveat: Empty KRX calendar runs are not counted as issuer daily coverage.

checks.eligibility_policy: active_scoring_universe rows where market=US. Source readiness means the FINRA daily file was checked for the ticker; absent FINRA rows stay null/low-evidence, not fabricated metrics.
checks.semantic_warning: FINRA source readiness is not the same as metric-ready coverage. Tickers absent from the daily file remain null/low-evidence rows.
checks.next_action: Keep US_CLASS foreign/class rows out of FINRA readiness until mapped or rebucketed; do not refetch FINRA for rows already checked in the counted daily file.

checks.eligibility_policy: active_scoring_universe rows where market=US and ticker is a plain OCC underlying; US_CLASS foreign/class rows stay in active US bucket but are excluded from OCC plain-underlying readiness until mapped or rebucketed.

accepted_form_policy.no_listed_options_policy: accepted_for_source_readiness_when_both_call_and_put_queries_return_no_record_for_the_counted_source_date; scoring proxy remains null/zero-evidence rather than fabricated activity

checks.next_action: Do not broad-fetch. Keep non-plain/foreign/class rows as mapping/denominator policy work outside the current plain-OCC readiness denominator; continue BRK accepted-form research separately.

checks.daily_gated_scope_policy: US_CLASS/non-plain active rows are included in S0 daily/gated via YF daily source freshness; FINRA/OCC proxy mapping remains a separate signal-expansion problem.
checks.next_action: If this blocks, rerun fetch-yf-finance.yml daily stock shards or targeted YF refresh for the listed US_CLASS/non-plain tickers before claiming all active S0 stocks as daily/gated.

checks.daily_gated_scope_policy: Current S0 daily/gated source scope is all active stock rows: KRX/KOSDAQ via KRX, plain US via FINRA/OCC source proof, HKEX/SSE/SZSE via scheduled YF daily stock shards.
checks.next_action: If this blocks, rerun fetch-yf-finance.yml daily stock shards or targeted YF refresh for the listed Asia tickers before claiming all active S0 stocks as daily/gated.

blocking_evidence.caveat: Readiness blocker counts only; no raw rows, private manifests, target ticker lists, or public scoring claims.

tracks.label: Expanded stock candidate promotion
tracks.caveat: Every S1 stock candidate is either current public S0 daily/gated or explicitly blocked by the promotion ledger; blocked rows stay non-public and non-scored.

promotion_gate_readiness.caveat: S1 completion means every normalized stock candidate is either promoted into the current public S0 daily/gated chain or explicitly excluded by the blocked promotion ledger; blocked rows are not fabricated public scores.

tracks.label: ETF scoring lane
tracks.caveat: ETF scores are public-surfaced by the named ETF gate. Full-universe DAILY/GATED remains a diagnostic/backlog track; ETF service DAILY/GATED is evaluated by the Core Daily Basket sublane.

evidence_based_readiness.service_gate_scope: ETF Core Daily Basket owns ETF service DAILY/GATED readiness; full scored-ETF daily 1Y continuity stays diagnostic until explicitly promoted.

daily_checks.caveat: Inception-limited gaps are allowed; fetchable required-history gaps keep daily=false.

Full scored-ETF daily 1Y continuity is a rolling diagnostic/backfill track. It must not block ETF Core Daily Basket service readiness; only immediately fetchable gaps keep the full-universe diagnostic lane daily=false.

service_daily_checks.caveat: Inception-limited gaps are allowed; fetchable required-history gaps keep daily=false.

diagnostic_backlog_checks.caveat: Full scored-ETF daily 1Y continuity is a rolling diagnostic/backfill track. It must not block ETF Core Daily Basket service readiness; only immediately fetchable gaps keep the full-universe diagnostic lane daily=false.

tracks.label: ETF Core Daily Basket
tracks.caveat: Core Basket is an internal daily-refresh target list and compact public summary. It cannot be reported as full ETF lane completion.

evidence_based_readiness.caveat: Core Daily Basket is a smaller ETF sublane. It does not flip full etf_scoring_lane daily/gated readiness.

tracks.label: Taiwan current active-universe numerator
tracks.caveat: Taiwan source work cannot improve the current numerator until Taiwan symbols are in the active scoring universe.

korea_252_queue.caveat: This is Korea 20-trading-day bounded progress. It does not change the latest fully populated proof beyond the batch end date.

us_252_reference_ticker_queue.caveat: This is 252-history progress for the 8 reference tickers only. It does not expand current active coverage beyond the existing computed US rows.

checks.caveat: 20260629 KRX run exists but is mostly empty; gate uses latest fully populated proof date.
Oldest YF history_1y observation date across US_CLASS/non-plain active rows; any missing/stale ticker blocks the all-active-stock S0 daily claim.
Oldest YF history_1y observation date across HKEX/SSE/SZSE active rows; any missing/stale ticker blocks the all-active-stock S0 daily claim.
Requires compact public summary mirror, no public full ETF signal payload, API route, and ETF detail UI card.
Fetchable required-history gaps keep ETF daily=false. Inception-limited gaps are tracked but do not block daily readiness by themselves.
Full scored-ETF daily 1Y continuity is a diagnostic/backfill track, not the ETF Core Daily Basket service gate.
This is the ETF service daily/gated target. Full ETF daily 1Y gaps stay in the separate rolling diagnostic/backfill lane.
Source readiness is separate from current active-universe numerator coverage.
